column1: George Springer leads the pack for Beat The Streak hitters, bringing a steady bat to the top of the Phillies lineup with a strong 70.6% hit probability and a clear platoon advantage against Jesus Luzardo. Jeremy Pena is right behind, setting the tone for Houston at home and flashing a reliable profile from the leadoff spot. Bo Bichette and Trea Turner both offer top-of-order roles and consistent contact skills, making them solid alternatives for streak chasers. Springer’s combination of matchup edge and table-setting opportunity makes him the day’s sharpest pick.
